results.name: synergy-dice
results.description: Various effects that either make dice rolling better, or love when you roll dice.

results.name: synergy-energy
results.description: Cards that care about obtaining or having energy counters, but not by spending them.

results.name: synergy-exile-cast
results.description: Cards that care about casting spells from exile.

results.name: synergy-exiling
results.description: These effects care about cards being exiled (as in the action).

results.name: synergy-face-down
results.description: Cards that have synergy with the various face down mechanics in the game, such as manifest, morph, cloak, etc.

results.name: synergy-graveyard-cast
results.description: Cards that care about casting spells from graveyards.

results.name: synergy-land-graveyard
results.description: Triggered Abilities that trigger whenever a land card hits the graveyard from anywhere (library, hand, battlefield etc)

results.name: synergy-library-cast
results.description: Cards that care about casting spells from the library.

results.name: synergy-low-power
results.description: Effects that care about you having creatures with power below some boundary value.

results.name: synergy-multicolor
results.description: Cards that care about you using multicolored cards.
